findings.problem: Artifact-generation helper skills still teach the superseded verification contract, so newly generated ai-enforced-workflow artifacts can drift back to the old model.
findings.evidence: .codex/skills/openspec-propose/SKILL.md:101, .codex/skills/openspec-ff-change/SKILL.md:92, and .codex/skills/openspec-continue-change/SKILL.md:116 still instruct 'Codex local review first, Gemini independent verification second'.
findings.recommendation: Update propose, ff-change, and continue-change guidance to reference verifier-subagent-first review, shared sequence verify-sequence/default, and tier-gated Gemini second opinion so future generated artifacts match the new workflow.
